R

remainingTimeProperty() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.ITime
Returns the observable property for the remaining time.
remainingTimeProperty() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Time
Provides access to the remaining time property for UI synchronization.
reset() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.IScore
Resets all score-related data, including points, errors, chapters, and seasons, to their initial values.
reset() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.IWords
Resets the word bank and progress counters to their initial game state.
reset() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Score
Resets all scoring, errors, and progress indicators to their starting values.
reset() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Words
Resets the entire game progress to Level 1 and repopulates all active word lists from the immutable master sources.
restart() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.ITime
Resets the timer to the default base time value.
restart() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Time
Resets the timer to the default base time (20 seconds).
restart(int) - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.ITime
Restarts the timer with a duration adjusted by the current difficulty level.
restart(int) - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Time
Restarts the timer with a dynamic duration based on the game difficulty.
